about.title: About Me
about.heading: Passionate About
about.bio: Hi! I'm Fredrik, a fullstack developer based in Stockholm, Sweden. I specialize in creating elegant, performant web applications that solve real-world problems. My journey in software development started with a fascination for how things work under the hood. Today, I combine that curiosity with practical experience in modern web technologies to build solutions that users love.
about.extraInfo: When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source projects, or sharing knowledge with the developer community.
